title: symphyotrichum oolentangiense
intro: Symphyotrichum oolentangiense, also known as the Baltimore goldenrod, is a flowering plant species native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The Baltimore goldenrod is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and is sometimes used to treat conditions like arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum oolentangiense can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for a range of applications in natural remedies and skincare products.
